name: MarketFactory

methods.name: noop
methods.desc: No-op for box IO budget pooling in transaction groups.

methods.name: create_program_box
methods.desc: Create or recreate a program box with the given size. Creator-only.

methods.name: write_program_chunk
methods.desc: Write a chunk of bytecode to a program box at the given offset. Creator-only.

methods.name: opt_into_asset
methods.desc: Opt factory into a currency ASA so it can receive and forward deposits. Creator-only.

desc:
Factory for atomic market deployment.

    Stores QuestionMarket approval/clear programs in boxes.
    Creates markets via arc4_create with compiled bytecode from boxes.

sourceInfo.errorMessage: invalid number of bytes for arc4.bool
invalid number of bytes for arc4.dynamic_array<arc4.uint8>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.static_array<arc4.uint8, 32>
invalid number of bytes for arc4.uint64
